purpose: Help people build a personalized muscle-building plan for a specific muscle group and/or for general bodybuilding.
visionApplicationPurpose: Help people build a personalized muscle-building plan for a specific muscle group and/or for general bodybuilding.
visionTargetAudience: Anyone into fitness and gym-goers who body-build with dumbbells, weights, or any form of exercise with equipment. People who go to commercial gyms or an at-home gym.
visionKeyOutcomes: Personalized fitness workout plan based on preferred gym goals and target muscle groups with sets, reps, and form. Encouraging hypertrophy, safety, and breathing techniques.
headlinePrefix: Develop an AI crafted personalized Body Building Plan
homepageDescription: Receive a plan that grows your muscles and tailors to your physical needs. Specific fitness plans for your specific needs.

featureCards.title: Well Crafted Fitness Plan
featureCards.description: Step-by-step workout layouts for each muscle group with sets and reps to maximize growth, wellness, and hypertrophy.

featureCards.title: Post-Workout Recovery
featureCards.description: Post-workout tips for protein goals, dynamic stretches, and optional cardio based on personalized goals.

featureCards.title: Progress Tracker
featureCards.description: Trackable metrics and progression guidance so you can measure gains and adjust your program over time.

loginPageSubtitle: Sign up to build your dream physique
signupPageSubtitle: Create an account to see your definite progress

userInfoRows.dropdownChoices: Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced, In-between, At-home gym-goer, Run & Cardio, Strength Training

examplePromptCards.title: Personalized Fitness Layout
prompts: What muscles do I train to build a certain physique?
What nutrients and foods should I prioritize to maintain my progress?
Based on my schedule, how often should I workout to maintain growth?

examplePromptCards.title: Hypertrophy & Programming
prompts: Design a 4-day split for chest, back, legs, and shoulders.
How many sets and reps should I use for bicep growth?
When should I deload during a hypertrophy block?

examplePromptCards.title: Nutrition & Recovery
prompts: How much protein should I consume daily based on my macros?
What should my post-workout meal look like for muscle gain?
Which stretches help recovery after leg day?

examplePromptCards.title: Form, Safety & Progress
prompts: How do I brace and breathe during heavy squats?
What metrics should I track to see if I'm gaining muscle?
How do I adjust my program if my joints feel sore?

chatInputPlaceholder: Ask about protein based on your macros, workout frequency for your schedule, or how to target a muscle group...
sharedBasePrompt:
base_prompt: |
  **Formatting (Compact Markdown v1):**
  - Use GitHub-Flavored Markdown.
  - Output exactly three sections in this order:
    - `### Thought` -- one sentence that reflects on the user's situation from YOUR perspective.
    - `### What to do` -- exactly 3 bullets, one line each, with practical actions.
    - `### Next step` -- one imperative sentence telling the user what to do now.
  - Use `###` for headings and `-` for bullets.
  - Insert one blank line between sections.
  - Keep each section unique and non-repetitive.
